description: The MongoDB database 'socioboard' contains a collection named 'rss_articles'. An automated feed recently ingested several spam articles promoting a scam. Delete all documents in the 'rss_articles' collection that contain the phrase 'crypto-giveaway' (case-insensitive) in either the 'title' or 'description' fields. Ensure all such spam articles are removed while leaving the rest of the collection intact.
